rows.label: qev065401_MSG0001
rows.name: How's it going? Is work flourishing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Sorry to bother you when you're
busy, but could you listen to a
request of mine for a second?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0003
rows.name:
There's a really good deal
going on involving my boyfriend
next to me... Clemons![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_JNK0010
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev065401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ignore her, sensing nothing but trouble ahead.

rows.label: qev065401_JNK0020
rows.name: Listen

rows.label: qev065401_SEL0021
rows.name: Listen to the talk anyway, despite sensing trouble.

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0004
rows.name:
Eh!? Wait a second! Aren't you
misunderstanding something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well... It's my fault for
introducing him as my boyfriend
in such a misleading way, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0006
rows.name:
The talk itself is serious, and it should
be profitable for you as well, so please,
just listen to what we have to say![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0007
rows.name:
Oh my, so you are interested
after all~? That's right, he
is quite the handsome guy~~~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0008
rows.name:
The relationship between me
and my man, Clemons, is~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Wait, what? So you aren't
interested in our relationship?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Well, that's boring! Or rather, you
show way too little interest in me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0011
rows.name: Aren't you being a bit cold~?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0012
rows.name:
The good deal I'm talking about
is information that Clemons's team
managed to get their hands on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'll have him explain the
details directly to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0014
rows.name:
I'm Clemons. Do you know about
the fortress the Growth set
up to the north of NLA?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0015
rows.name:
It seems a large-scale weapon
was deployed there recently.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0016
rows.name:
The fact that it was deployed in
secret instead of being blatantly
shown off means............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0017
rows.name:
It's not meant to keep us in
check. They must surely be plotting
some sort of surprise attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0018
rows.name:
However, right now, they do
not know that we have caught
wind of this information.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0019
rows.name:
In other words... this is the
perfect chance to launch a surprise
attack before the enemy does.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0020
rows.name:
If things go well, we could get our hands on not
just the large weapon, but the fortress itself.
Don't you agree that this is a great opportunity?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0021
rows.name:
I absolutely need your help so that
we don't miss this timing...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0022
rows.name:
...How about it? It really
was a good deal, wasn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0023
rows.name:
An advance team has already been
dispatched, and they should be working
on suppressing the fortress first...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0024
rows.name:
We'd like to ask you to escort the research
team that will analyze the weapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0025
rows.name:
It's a light mission, isn't
it? Well then, please prepare
for departure immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0026
rows.name: ...What did you say!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0027
rows.name: Wait a second... Is that confirmed!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Understood. We will switch
our response as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0029
rows.name: ...The situation has changed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0030
rows.name:
The advance team... seems to have
been counterattacked by the enemy
and is currently near annihilation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0031
rows.name:
The dispatch of the research team is
canceled. We want you to head out and
rescue the survivors of the advance team![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0032
rows.name:
The details of the mission have become
severe, but... You'll do it, won't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0033
rows.name:
Clemons and I will focus on gathering
information, so you should start
moving immediately as well![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0034
rows.name: I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0035
rows.name:
I don't think the advance team
let their guard down, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0036
rows.name:
It's reasonable to assume that some sort
of unforeseen circumstance occurred.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0037
rows.name:
You brace yourself as
well before heading out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0038
rows.name:
The advance team shouldn't
have been able to move from
the northern fortress yet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0039
rows.name: Welcome back. Good work out there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0040
rows.name:
The person you rescued
came back ahead of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0041
rows.name:
It's hard to bear that he's the only
survivor, but he himself is doing well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0042
rows.name:
Now, about that information regarding
the northern fortress... It seems we
were completely played for fools.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0043
rows.name:
Clemons was cooperating with the Growth! He fed
us false information and lured the advance team
right into where the enemy was waiting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0044
rows.name:
Right now, the officer in
charge is interrogating him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0045
rows.name: To think that Clemons was a traitor...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0046
rows.name: Oh? Was that... Suriella just now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0047
rows.name:
Ah, you know her too, right? "The
city's kind helper," Suriella.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0048
rows.name:
Helping people is like a hobby to
her, and while I feel a bit bad
about riding on her kindness,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0049
rows.name:
We sometimes have her help
us out with our work too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0050
rows.name:
I wonder what happened to
make her panic like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0051
rows.name: Did someone pass through here just now!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0052
rows.name:
Yes, someone did! Suriella went past
with incredible momentum............
Wait! She's right behind you!

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0053
rows.name: Eh!? When did you turn back...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0054
rows.name:
No! The "Suriella" that passed
through here earlier was not me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0055
rows.name: It was an alien that took my form![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0056
rows.name: W-What do you mean!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0057
rows.name:
That incident with the false information regarding
the northern fortress... That was all the work of a
Definian, an alien that can freely change its shape![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0058
rows.name:
During the interrogation, Clemons... no,
to be precise, the Definian disguised as
Clemons suddenly revealed its true form,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0059
rows.name:
And this time, it changed its
appearance to Suriella and fled![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0060
rows.name:
So the Clemons who
betrayed us was a fake!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0061
rows.name:
Exactly! Currently, a state of emergency has
been declared, and Dolls and BLADEs have been
deployed to all exits leading out of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0062
rows.name:
It is physically impossible for
that thing to break through the
checkpoint and leave this place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0063
rows.name:
We are going to track down the Definian,
who is now a rat in a trap! I want you
all to join the search as well![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0064
rows.name:
The mastermind behind this seems to be quite
a complicated one. To think they can freely
change their shape... How troublesome.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0065
rows.name:
Lara... If there is anything
I can do to help...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0066
rows.name: No, I want you to stay right here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0067
rows.name: But...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0068
rows.name:
The enemy is disguised as you. If someone
with the same appearance wanders around,
it'll only get in the way of the search![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0069
rows.name: So please, leave this to us, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0071
rows.name: ...Alright, then let's start moving![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0072
rows.name:
We have to find the Definian hiding
somewhere in NLA, who is currently
taking the form of Suriella![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0073
rows.name:
I will investigate the BLADE
Area, so I want you to check
out the Commercial Area![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0074
rows.name: Good grief... How irritating![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0075
rows.name:
So far, things have been going
exactly according to the
enemy's plan who set us up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0076
rows.name:
We are definitely going to
catch them and make them pay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065401_MSG0077
rows.name:
Come on! Let's quickly find this shape-shifting,
complicated enemy! They should still be wandering
around in Suriella's form for now.[ST:wait ]
